name: Autoimmune Disease Phenotype
description: This test case evaluates the ability to identify patients with autoimmune diseases using a complex temporal pattern requiring multiple diagnosis codes over time. It tests the LLM's capability to construct queries with temporal constraints, multiple code lookups across different terminology systems (ICD-9, ICD-10, SNOMED), and logical grouping of related autoimmune conditions. The phenotype spans 51 autoimmune diseases across 9 disease groups and requires sophisticated date-based filtering.
prompt: Find patients with any autoimmune disease diagnosis where they have at least 3 diagnosis codes for the same autoimmune condition on distinct days, with the first and last diagnoses being at least 7 days apart.
